description_long: This object depicts a life-sized bird with a streamlined body, long neck, and pointed beak, positioned as if peering into water. The bird's plumage is predominantly dark blue to black on the back and wings, adorned with a striking pattern of white spots and bars, while the underparts are white. The head and neck are a deep blue-gray, with a distinct white necklace marking at the base of the neck. The bird is mounted on a textured, irregularly shaped base resembling a patch of ground or a rock by water. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is short and pointed, extending just beyond the base. The overall appearance is highly realistic, capturing the bird's natural posture and intricate feather details.
description: A realistic, life-sized bird with dark blue and white spotted plumage, long neck, and pointed beak, mounted on a textured base. The bird's detailed feather pattern and naturalistic pose evoke a waterfowl by a pond.
description_view_0: The bird is seen from the front left, with its head lowered and beak pointing toward the base, highlighting the long neck and detailed head markings.
description_view_1: A rear view showing the bird's back, tail, and the full extent of the white spots and bars on the dark wings and back.
description_view_2: The bird is viewed from the back right, emphasizing the tail, folded wings, and the transition from dark upperparts to white underparts.
description_view_3: A front right view focusing on the bird's head, beak, and the white necklace marking at the base of the neck.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Dark upperparts with white spots and bars, white underparts, and a white necklace marking on the neck
